title: ‘Heart of the Beast’ Trailer: Brad Pitt and a German Shepherd Struggle to Survive the Alaskan Wilderness

blocks.content: Paramount Pictures has released the trailer for “Heart of the Beast,” a new survival thriller film starring .Pitt plays James Belmont, a former Army Special Forces soldier who must find a way to return to civilization after his small plane crashes deep in the Alaskan wilderness. Joined by a retired service dog named Odin, who protects him from bears, wolves and other beasts, Pitt’s character battles the elements and embarks on a desperate attempt to stay alive, climbing mountains and crossing rivers.
